title: Create 'databases' and 'sigma1' Kubernetes Namespaces
description: Create the 'databases' namespace for infrastructure components and the 'sigma1' namespace for application services.
details: Use `kubectl create namespace databases` and `kubectl create namespace sigma1` to provision the required Kubernetes namespaces.
test_strategy: Verify both 'databases' and 'sigma1' namespaces exist using `kubectl get ns databases sigma1`.

title: Provision 'sigma1-assets' S3/R2 Bucket
description: Provision an S3/R2 compatible bucket named 'sigma1-assets' for storing application assets, such as product images.
details: Use Cloudflare Terraform or the Cloudflare R2 dashboard/API to create the 'sigma1-assets' bucket in the designated R2 account.
test_strategy: Verify the 'sigma1-assets' bucket exists and is accessible using `rclone lsjson r2:sigma1-assets` or by checking the Cloudflare R2 dashboard.

title: Set up Cloudflare Tunnel for Morgan Agent
description: Establish a Cloudflare Tunnel for initial connectivity for the 'morgan' service, pointing to a placeholder service or internal IP for initial connectivity.
details: Create a Cloudflare Tunnel, configure its ingress rules to point to a placeholder service (e.g., `http://localhost:8080` or a dummy service within Kubernetes), and ensure the `cloudflared` client is running and connected.
test_strategy: Verify the tunnel is active and reachable from the internet using `cloudflared tunnel status` and by attempting to access the configured public hostname.

title: Deploy CloudNative-PG Operator
description: Deploy the CloudNative-PG operator into the 'databases' namespace to enable declarative management of PostgreSQL instances.
details: Apply the CloudNative-PG operator YAML manifests or use its Helm chart to deploy it into the 'databases' namespace. Ensure the operator pods are running and healthy.
test_strategy: Verify the CloudNative-PG operator pod is running in the 'databases' namespace using `kubectl get pods -n databases -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cloudnative-pg`.

title: Deploy Redis Operator
description: Deploy a Redis operator (e.g., Redis Enterprise Operator or similar) into the 'databases' namespace to manage Redis/Valkey instances.
details: Apply the Redis operator YAML manifests or use its Helm chart to deploy it into the 'databases' namespace. Ensure the operator pods are running and healthy.
test_strategy: Verify the Redis operator pod is running in the 'databases' namespace using `kubectl get pods -n databases -l app=redis-operator` (adjust label as per actual operator deployment).

title: Deploy 'sigma1-postgres' Cluster
description: Deploy a single-instance PostgreSQL cluster named 'sigma1-postgres' in the 'databases' namespace, configured with persistent storage (50Gi) and an initial 'sigma1' database and 'sigma1_user'.
details: Create a `Cluster` Custom Resource for CloudNative-PG, specifying a single replica, 50Gi persistent storage, and initial database 'sigma1' with user 'sigma1_user'. Deploy this CR into the 'databases' namespace.
test_strategy: Verify 'sigma1-postgres' pods are running and healthy in the 'databases' namespace. Connect to the PostgreSQL instance using `psql` from within the cluster to confirm 'sigma1' database and 'sigma1_user' exist and are accessible.

title: Deploy 'sigma1-valkey' Cluster
description: Deploy a single-instance Redis/Valkey cluster named 'sigma1-valkey' in the 'databases' namespace using the `valkey/valkey:7.2-alpine` image.
details: Create a `Redis` (or equivalent) Custom Resource for the Redis operator, specifying a single replica and the `valkey/valkey:7.2-alpine` image. Deploy this CR into the 'databases' namespace.
test_strategy: Verify 'sigma1-valkey' pods are running and healthy in the 'databases' namespace. Connect to the Valkey instance using `redis-cli` from within the cluster to confirm accessibility and basic functionality.

title: Generate S3/R2 Access Credentials for 'sigma1-assets'
description: Generate necessary access key ID and secret access key for the 'sigma1-assets' S3/R2 bucket to allow programmatic access.
details: Use the Cloudflare R2 API or dashboard to generate an API token with read/write permissions specifically for the 'sigma1-assets' bucket. Securely store the generated credentials.
test_strategy: Use the generated credentials with `rclone` or `aws s3` CLI to perform a test upload and download to the 'sigma1-assets' bucket, verifying read/write access.

title: Create 'sigma1-infra-endpoints' ConfigMap
description: Create a ConfigMap named 'sigma1-infra-endpoints' in the 'sigma1' namespace, containing connection strings and credentials for PostgreSQL, Redis, S3/R2, and Cloudflare Tunnel details.
details: Construct a Kubernetes ConfigMap named 'sigma1-infra-endpoints' in the 'sigma1' namespace. Populate it with `POSTGRES_URL`, `REDIS_URL`, `S3_BUCKET_NAME`, `S3_ACCESS_KEY_ID`, `S3_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY`, and the Cloudflare Tunnel hostname. Ensure URLs are correctly formatted for service consumption.
test_strategy: Verify the 'sigma1-infra-endpoints' ConfigMap exists in the 'sigma1' namespace using `kubectl get cm sigma1-infra-endpoints -n sigma1 -o yaml`. Inspect its content to ensure all required keys are present and values are correctly formatted and accessible (e.g., `ping` PostgreSQL/Redis endpoints from a test pod).

title: Review Core Infrastructure Setup
description: Conduct a comprehensive review of all deployed core infrastructure components, configurations, and the `sigma1-infra-endpoints` ConfigMap to ensure correctness, security, and adherence to best practices.
details: Verify all Kubernetes resources (namespaces, operators, clusters, ConfigMap) are correctly deployed and configured. Check logs for errors. Confirm external services (S3/R2, Cloudflare Tunnel) are properly integrated and accessible. Validate all test strategies from previous subtasks have passed.
test_strategy: Confirm all previous subtask test strategies have been executed and passed. Perform an end-to-end connectivity test from a sample application pod to all provisioned infrastructure using the ConfigMap details to ensure full integration.
